executive_summary: Pro Forma Adjusted Revenue grew from $8,955K (2020A) to $46,423K (TTM Aug-24) per the Historical P&L Summary, with PF Adj. EBITDA of $9,239K (19.9% margin) in TTM Aug-24 versus Reported EBITDA of $2,773K (7.9% margin), reflecting substantial diligence and pro forma adjustments totaling $9,599K in revenue adjustments and $2,100K in corporate opex adjustments in TTM Aug-24 alone. The most notable financial risk is the large gap between reported and pro forma adjusted figures, with $9,599K in diligence revenue adjustments and $2,100K in corporate opex adjustments in TTM Aug-24 driving the majority of the adjusted EBITDA uplift.
